subject: Support to change substitution mapping node or version after service creation
commit_message:
Support to change substitution mapping node or version after service creation

Before changing check for service property usage in sub
mapping node change

Issue-ID: SDC-4439
Issue-ID: SDC-4430
Signed-off-by: JvD_Ericsson <jeff.van.dam@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ia0f24c626ac836f0b4e7ffbe0004e7ab30089b25

Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

The error message when the change is rejected could perhaps be a little clearer, e.g. 
instead of:

Cannot change service node type as node type properties are in use by {appender_0=[layout, name]}.

would be clearer something like:
Cannot change substitution node type as properties of the existing type are in use by properties layout, name on appender_0.
